response.markdownReport:
# BestStrat Report — CAKE/1h

## Strategy
**Name:** Range Aware Mean Reversion Strategy  
**Detected Regime:** Range / Mixed (62% confidence)  
**Data Source:** Deterministic sample market data

Use range-aware rules when trend strength is mixed, avoiding breakout assumptions until momentum becomes clearer.

## Market State
- Trend: Bearish
- Volatility: High
- Sentiment: Positive
- Liquidity: High
- Latest price used by engine: 2.456436

## Entry Rules
- Enter only near range support after RSI recovers from below 45
- Require price to hold above short-term support for at least one confirmation candle
- Avoid entry when MACD histogram continues weakening

## Exit Rules
- Exit near range midpoint or upper range resistance
- Exit if price breaks below the recent support zone
- Exit if volatility expands without directional trend

## Risk Rules
- Use moderate sizing with maximum 40% to 55% model exposure
- Do not chase breakouts in mixed regimes
- Invalidate strategy if drawdown exceeds 8%

## Invalidation Rules
- Invalid if regime flips to Risk Off
- Invalid if price breaks the lower range with rising volume
- Invalid if liquidity weakens while volatility expands

## No Trade Conditions
- No clear range
- Breakdown below support
- Conflicting trend and momentum signals
- Weak liquidity or unstable volume confirmation
- Volatility spike without clear trend confirmation

## Backtest Results
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total Return | 14.9% |
| Win Rate | 17% |
| Max Drawdown | 5.8% |
| Number of Trades | 18 |
| Average Trade Return | 1.7% |
| Best Trade | 50.9% |
| Worst Trade | -2.7% |
| Risk Adjusted Score | 67 |

## Signal Breakdown
| Signal | Score | Status | Reason |
|--------|-------|--------|--------|
| RSI | 84 | Bullish | RSI is 52.9, showing constructive momentum. |
| MACD | 82 | Bullish | MACD is above its signal line. |
| Volume | 24 | Weak | Latest volume is 0.54x its 20-candle average. |
| Fear & Greed | 81 | Positive | Fear and Greed proxy score is 81.2 from the market dataset. |
| Sentiment | 67 | Positive | Sentiment proxy score is 67.2, derived from quote momentum and market context. |
| Volatility | 35 | High | ATR is 5.98% of price, so volatility is high. |
| Regime | 62 | Range / Mixed | Composite regime model classified CAKE as Range / Mixed. |

---
Generated by BestStrat. Research strategy specification only. Not financial advice. No trade execution.
